wikitext:
'''Test Subject''' is a {{2|Bosses|Boss}} found in {{2|Glory}}. It has three phases, reviving twice with increasing HP and new powers.<tabber>|-|Phase 1=
{{Enemy Infobox|Test Subject|2}} {{Power Infobox|Adaptable|2}} {{Power Infobox|Enrage|2}}
=== Pattern ===
{{Intents|Test Subject|2}}
Starts with {{BD|Adaptable||2}} and {{BD|Enrage||2}} 2 ({{Asc|9|3|2}}). Alternates between {{Int|Test Subject|Bite||2}} and {{Int|Test Subject|Skull Bash||2}}.

When reduced to 0 HP, {{BD|Adaptable||2}} prevents death and it revives into Phase 2.

{{Clear}}

|-|Phase 2=
{{Enemy Infobox|Test Subject (Phase 2)|2}} {{Power Infobox|Painful Stabs|2}}
=== Pattern ===
{{Intents|Test Subject (Phase 2)|2}}
Revives with 200 ({{Asc|8|212|2}}) HP and gains {{BD|Painful Stabs||2}}. Uses {{Int|Test Subject (Phase 2)|Multi-Claw||2}} every turn. {{Int|Test Subject (Phase 2)|Multi-Claw||2}} starts at 3 hits and gains +1 hit each use.

When reduced to 0 HP again, it revives into Phase 3.

{{Clear}}

|-|Phase 3=
{{Enemy Infobox|Test Subject (Phase 3)|2}} {{Power Infobox|Nemesis|2}}
=== Pattern ===
{{Intents|Test Subject (Phase 3)|2}}
Revives with 300 ({{Asc|8|313|2}}) HP, gains {{BD|Nemesis||2}}, and loses {{BD|Adaptable||2}} and {{BD|Painful Stabs||2}}. Cycles through:
# {{Int|Test Subject (Phase 3)|Lacerate||2}}
# {{Int|Test Subject (Phase 3)|Big Pounce||2}}
# {{Int|Test Subject (Phase 3)|Burning Growl||2}}
# Back to {{Int|Test Subject (Phase 3)|Lacerate||2}}

This is the final phase — the Test Subject can now be killed permanently.

{{Clear}}</tabber>

== Notes ==
* Each of Test Subject's phases will lose all status effects when transitioning to the next phase, including the {{KW|Strength||2}} gained from {{BD|Enrage||2}} in the first phase.
* Cards with {{KW|Fatal||2}} triggers (such as {{C|Feed||2}}, {{C|The Hunt||2}}, & {{C|Hand of Greed||2}}.) will trigger successfully during ''any phase'' of the Test Subject's.
** Because the Test Subject is a {{2|Bosses|Boss}} in Act 3, after which there are no opportunities to spend gold or earn card rewards, {{C|Feed||2}} is currently the only card with a {{KW|Fatal||2}} trigger that matters.
* After Test Subject loses all its HP in a phase, it cannot be targeted by any cards until it revives into the next phase.

== Trivia ==

* Each phase of the Test Subject's boss battle is based on an Elite enemy from the original Slay the Spire:
** Phase 1's {{BD|Enrage||2}} buff is shared with the Act 1 elite [[Gremlin Nob]]. The Test Subject's claws and the spikes on its back also resemble the Gremlin Nob's horns.
** Phase 2's {{BD|Painful Stabs||2}} buff is shared with the Act 2 elite [[Book of Stabbing]].
** Phase 3's {{BD|Nemesis||2}} buff is identical to the ability of the Act 3 elite [[Nemesis]], and its icon depicts the mask worn by Nemesis.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)'''
** Changed '''Test Subject''': Phase 2 no longer has the Pounce move, instead will repeat Multi Claw move every turn
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Test Subject to the game.
